DatasetTitle: NS-SEC OF HOUSEHOLD REFERENCE PERSON (HRP) AGED UNDER 65 - USUAL RESIDENTS
StatisticalPopulations: All usual residents in households where HRP is aged under 65
Annotations: 1. Long-term unemployed - For long-term unemployed, year last worked is 2009 or earlier.; 2. Full-time students - In the classification, all full-time students are recorded in the 'full-time students' category whether they are economically active or inactive.
